title: local-signing: unreachable parse_key error branch
description: validate_algorithm() (secretx-local-signing/src/lib.rs:115) rejects unknown algorithm strings before any I/O. parse_key() then re-matches on the same string, including an other => Err(InvalidUri(...)) arm at line 164 that can never be reached because validate_algorithm already rejected it. — Suggested rewrite: either remove validate_algorithm and rely on parse_key's match (returning InvalidUri from there), or convert parse_key's other arm to unreachable!() to make the invariant explicit to the compiler.
